---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for TokenForge
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence: what should TokenForge do that it does not do today?

## Problem This Solves

What workflow or pain point does this address?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? What should the API, UI, or behavior look like?

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this? Why is your approach better?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, examples, or anything else that helps explain the request.

---

> **Tip:** The most impactful requests are ones that affect the local-first, privacy-preserving mission of TokenForge.
